title: chionohebe ciliolata
intro: Chionohebe ciliolata, also known as the New Zealand hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Chionohebe ciliolata include its ability to help with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to support immune function. Chionohebe ciliolata can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and has also been studied for its potential as a natural antiviral agent.
